HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

11#include "GreenFHom3DPer.h"
12
13// -----------------------------
14// Construction & lifetime
15// -----------------------------
16GreenFHom3DPer::GreenFHom3DPer(dcmplx wvl, dcmplx eps, rvec kin)
17 : GreenFHom3D(wvl, eps), k(kin), evaluationTerms(0) {}
18
19GreenFHom3DPer::GreenFHom3DPer(dcmplx wvl, dcmplx eps, dcmplx mu, rvec kin)
20 : GreenFHom3D(wvl, eps, mu), k(kin), evaluationTerms(0) {}
21
22GreenFHom3DPer::~GreenFHom3DPer() {}
23
24// -----------------------------
25// Thresholding helper
26// -----------------------------
27void GreenFHom3DPer::Assign(rvec r, rvec rp, rvec l,
28 std::pair<bool, rvec>& out) {
29 if (!GreenFHom3D::AboveThreshold(r - rp, l)) {
30 out.first = false;
31 out.second = l;
32 }
33}
34
35// -----------------------------
36// Controls
37// -----------------------------
38void GreenFHom3DPer::EvaluationTerms(int n) {
39 std::cout << "Number of evaluation terms: " << n << std::endl;
40 evaluationTerms = n;
41}
